The '''Action II transport''' was an early [[Action series/Legends|Action series]] [[Bulk transport/Legends|bulk transport]] that looked like a box with an engine and pods for the command and living areas.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
